# Predy Player

## 环境准备

- Node.js `>= 10.0.0`

## 本地开发

``` bash
# 1. 安装依赖（首次）
npm install
# 2. 编译
npm run build
# 3. demo
npm run dev
```

> 浏览器打开：http://localhost:9000/

## 测试

``` bash
npm run dev
```

> 浏览器打开：http://localhost:9000/test.html
> 
> 单侧： https://local.xiaohongshu.com:9000/test.html

## 文档


## 使用方法

``` html
<body>
<div class="container" style="width: 512px;height: 512px;">
</div>
</body>
```

``` js
import { PredyPlayer } from '@alipay/mars-player';

const player = new PredyPlayer({container:document.querySelector('.container')});

player.loadSceneAsync('https://gw.alipayobjects.com/os/basement_prod/ede52341-26a7-4613-ae0a-2e7ee12a56e0.json')
.then(scene=>player.playAsync(scene));
```
